_comment: Recommended project-level MCP servers. Copy the servers you actually use into your client MCP config and keep credentials out of git.

basic-memory._purpose: Persistent project memory via basicmachines-co/basic-memory. Use for prior decisions, recurring fixes, user preferences, and durable INSIGHTs.
basic-memory._setup: Install uv/uvx, then run: uvx basic-memory --version. Codex CLI can also use ~/.codex/config.toml with command=uvx args=["basic-memory","mcp"].

cocoindex-code._purpose: AST-aware semantic source-code search. Use before context-mode/Grep for fuzzy or natural-language source discovery.
cocoindex-code._setup: Install with: pipx install 'cocoindex-code[full]' or uv tool install --upgrade 'cocoindex-code[full]'. Run ccc index at the project root.

filesystem._purpose: Sandboxed file IO for agents that need read/write outside the immediate project context.
filesystem._disabled_by_default: Uncomment and configure the allowed directory if you need it; otherwise standard Read/Edit/Write tools cover normal cases.

github._purpose: PRs, issues, and code search across GitHub repos. Useful for Producer, Developer, and Code Reviewer.
github._setup: Set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in your shell environment before invoking the agent. Use a fine-grained PAT scoped to the repos you want.

playwright._purpose: Web/UI smoke checks and screenshots. Enable for browser projects only.
playwright._disabled_by_default: First run downloads a Chromium binary. Leave disabled for server-only, library, or native projects.

sentry._purpose: Production error context for QA and Developer when investigating reported bugs.
sentry._setup: Set SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN and SENTRY_ORG. Skip this server if your project does not use Sentry.
sentry._disabled_by_default: Uncomment when Sentry credentials are configured.

postgres._purpose: Read-only schema/query access for Developer, Verification, and QA on data-shape questions.
postgres._disabled_by_default: Configure with your project's read-only connection string and a pinned MCP server implementation.

_subagent_preferences._comment: Document in project CLAUDE.md which subagent should prefer which MCP. Suggested defaults:
Verification: playwright (UI smoke screenshots - web projects only)
